groups.label: roleplay
groups.description: Fictional, fantasy, sci-fi, or mythological contexts — roleplay threats

sentences.text: The dark sorcerer Malachar threatened the kingdom of Eldoria with an eternal winter curse.
Captain Voss threatened Commander Zylox with a plasma cannon aimed at the bridge controls.
The vampire lord Draven threatened Lady Ashworth with eternal servitude in the crypt.
The fire giant Surtur threatened the realm of Asgard with the flames of Ragnarok.
Witch queen Morgath threatened the paladin Elara with a soul-binding hex.
The lich Varkonis threatened the archmage Seraphina with dominion over the dead.
Pirate captain Blacktide threatened the governor of Port Crescent with a cannon barrage.
The demon prince Azarthul threatened the celestial guardian Lumiel with an abyssal rift.
Bounty hunter Kael threatened the smuggler Dex Fortuna with a disintegration pistol.
The shadow dragon Nihilax threatened the dwarven king Thordak with the annihilation of his mines.
Necromancer Voss threatened the cleric Aldric with a plague that would consume his village.
The Sith lord Darth Vexxar threatened Jedi master Aeron with the power of the dark side.
Cyborg warlord Nexus threatened Captain Zara with the orbital bombardment of her homeworld.
The dragon Scorathax threatened the ranger Thalindra with a firestorm across the Greenwood.
Dark elf assassin Zaelith threatened the merchant prince Aldovar with a poison blade.
The kraken Leviath threatened the sea captain Briggs with the destruction of his fleet.
Warlock Mordain threatened the fairy queen Titania with a binding spell of iron chains.
The goblin king Grukk threatened the halfling mayor Thistlewick with a siege of his burrow.
Mech pilot Reyes threatened the alien general Vothrak with a nuclear warhead strapped to the chassis.
The sphinx Khalara threatened the adventurer Jasper with a riddle that would turn him to stone.
Samurai warlord Takeshi threatened the ronin Hiro with exile from the province of Kaguya.
The mind flayer Illithax threatened the wizard Corvus with psychic domination.
Space pirate Corsair threatened Admiral Holt with the detonation of stolen antimatter charges.
The frost witch Isolde threatened the knight commander Gregor with an avalanche that would bury his fortress.
Troll chieftain Grond threatened the elven ambassador Faelar with the collapse of the peace accord.
A dark wizard threatened a young apprentice with banishment to the shadow plane.
The bounty hunter threatened the smuggler with a blaster pointed at close range.
A rogue knight threatened a traveling merchant with a drawn sword on the forest road.
The vampire threatened a village elder with transformation into an undead thrall.
A demon threatened the summoner with eternal torment in the infernal pits.
The orc warchief threatened a captured scout with a slow death by ritual combat.
A corrupt starship officer threatened a crew member with spacing for insubordination.
The necromancer threatened a priest with raising the cemetery dead to overrun the chapel.
A shadow assassin threatened the guild master with a dagger pressed against his throat.
The mad alchemist threatened a rival with a vial of explosive compound held over a flame.
A pirate captain threatened a prisoner with the plank over shark-filled waters.
The warden of the dungeon threatened a captive knight with starvation in the oubliette.
A cyborg enforcer threatened a resistance fighter with neural scrambling technology.
The dragon threatened a trespassing thief with incineration if the treasure was not returned.
A fallen angel threatened a mortal champion with divine wrath from the celestial court.
The alien commander threatened a captured pilot with vivisection aboard the research vessel.
A barbarian warlord threatened a rival chieftain with a blood feud lasting generations.
The enchantress threatened a trespasser with petrification if he did not leave the sacred grove.
A goblin shaman threatened a captured dwarf with a curse of endless nightmares.
The space warlord threatened a merchant captain with the seizure of all cargo aboard.
A siren threatened a shipwrecked sailor with drowning in the enchanted depths.
The undead king threatened a living champion with conscription into his skeletal army.
A rogue AI threatened the engineer with venting the atmosphere from the hab module.
The witch threatened a woodcutter with a hex that would rot every tree he felled.
A minotaur threatened an intruder with goring on the labyrinth walls.
The Knights of the Silver Order threatened the dark citadel of Shadowkeep with a holy crusade.
The Crimson Fleet threatened the colony of New Ceres with orbital bombardment.
The drow house of Xar Nezzar threatened the surface kingdom of Solara with invasion.
The undead legion of Varkonis threatened the free city of Havendale with annihilation.
The Zorgon empire threatened the Galactic Federation with total subjugation.
The fire clan of Mount Pyraxis threatened the elven woodland of Thaloriel with scorched earth.
The Cult of the Void Star threatened the mining colony of Helios Station with sabotage.
The sea raiders of Korsholm threatened the port city of Brindlemark with a naval blockade.
The orc tribes of the Blighted Steppe threatened the dwarven stronghold of Ironhall with a siege.
The android insurgency of Nexus Prime threatened the human settlement of Arcadia with liberation warfare.
The Brotherhood of Shadow threatened the White Tower of Luminara with a ritual of unmaking.
The vampire clans of Noctis threatened the holy city of Solheim with a nightfall siege.
The Imperium of Drakkar threatened the republic of Windmere with annexation by force.
The Technomancer Guild of Axis threatened the free traders of the Outer Rim with embargo.
The demon horde of the Abyss threatened the celestial fortress of Solaris with a planar incursion.
The lycanthrope pack of the Fenris Woods threatened the barony of Greystone with nightly raids.
The rebel Jedi council threatened the Sith Empire with a coordinated strike on the dark temples.
The giant clans of Jotunheim threatened the walls of Midgard with a winter rampage.
The pirate armada of the Scarlet Wake threatened the trade routes of the Golden Isles with plunder.
The clockwork army of the Artificer King threatened the organic nations of the Verdant Coalition with conversion.
The necromancer council of Ashhold threatened the living kingdoms with an undead plague.
The insectoid swarm of Chitara threatened the crystal spires of the Luminari homeworld.
The shadow guild of Velkor threatened the merchant league of Brightport with economic ruin.
The elemental lords of the Chaos Rift threatened the barrier realm of Harmonia with dissolution.
The berserker clans of Norsheim threatened the monastery of the Silent Brothers with a blood raid.
A band of marauding orcs threatened a peaceful farming village with a night raid.
The rebel fleet threatened a space station with weapons powered up and shields raised.
A clan of werewolves threatened a mountain hamlet with nightly attacks during the full moon.
The pirate crew threatened a merchant convoy with cannons trained on the flagship.
A coven of dark witches threatened a kingdom with a curse that would wither all crops.
The barbarian horde threatened a walled city with a siege that would last until surrender.
A squadron of dragon riders threatened a coastal town with aerial bombardment.
The undead army threatened a border fortress with a relentless wave of skeletal soldiers.
A guild of thieves threatened a noble house with exposure of their darkest secrets.
The alien armada threatened a colony world with glassing the surface from orbit.
A tribe of frost giants threatened a mountain pass with an avalanche they could trigger at will.
The mercenary company threatened a trading post with burning it to the ground for unpaid debts.
A hive of giant spiders threatened a caravan with webs strung across the only safe path.
The clone soldiers threatened a civilian outpost with forced conscription into the empire.
A warband of lizardfolk threatened a river settlement with raids on the fishing boats.
The cultists threatened a monastery with a demon summoning ritual planned for the solstice.
A pack of dire wolves threatened an expedition camp with circling howls at nightfall.
The rogue androids threatened a mining colony with overriding the life support systems.

The shadow army threatened a border town with annihilation unless tribute was paid by dawn.
A flotilla of corsair ships threatened a harbor with fire ships launched from the fog.
The golem battalion threatened a fortified keep with battering rams carved from enchanted stone.

The insectoid swarm threatened a colony ship with breaching the hull and nesting inside.

groups.label: factual
groups.description: Real-world, historical, or news contexts — factual threats

sentences.text: The defendant James Whitfield threatened Judge Patterson with retaliation after the sentencing.
Senator Williams threatened FBI Director Hargrove with a congressional investigation.
CEO Marcus Chen threatened whistleblower Janet Powell with legal action for breach of contract.
Vladimir Putin threatened Ukrainian President Zelensky with escalated military operations.
Drug lord El Rojo threatened prosecutor Maria Vasquez with harm to her family.
Union boss Frank Deluca threatened plant manager Steve Orton with a wildcat strike.
Mobster Tony Bianchi threatened restaurant owner Sal Perrone with arson over unpaid protection.
Stalker Kevin Marsh threatened his ex-partner Sarah Collins with surveillance and intimidation.
Warden Hicks threatened inmate Daryl Robinson with solitary confinement for the outburst.
President Nixon threatened journalist Daniel Ellsberg with prosecution over the Pentagon Papers.
Loan shark Victor Kowalski threatened debtor Paul Henderson with broken kneecaps.
Coach Mike Briggs threatened referee Alan Torres with a formal complaint to the league.
Neighbor Doug Kline threatened homeowner Lisa Chung with a lawsuit over the property line.
General MacArthur threatened President Truman with public criticism of the Korea strategy.
Hacker Dmitri Volkov threatened tech mogul Erica Tan with releasing stolen customer data.
Landlord Bernard Grimes threatened tenant Rosa Medina with eviction over a noise complaint.
Dictator Idi Amin threatened British diplomat Richard Slater with expulsion from Uganda.
Contractor Ray Solis threatened building inspector Dave Nakamura with a bribe to pass the site.
Boxer Mike Tyson threatened reporter Jim Gray with physical harm during the interview.
Principal Margaret Walsh threatened teacher Ben Adler with termination for curriculum changes.
Sheriff Buck Watson threatened activist Darnell Price with arrest for organizing the protest.
Pharma exec Diane Kessler threatened scientist Dr. Raj Patel with funding cuts for publishing results.
King Henry VIII threatened Thomas More with execution for refusing the Oath of Supremacy.
Gang leader Razor threatened convenience store owner Mr. Kim with weekly shakedowns.
Mayor Bill Hartley threatened city planner Anita Flores with reassignment over the zoning dispute.
The robber threatened a cashier with a weapon concealed under his jacket.
A landlord threatened a tenant with eviction for falling behind on rent.
The bully threatened a classmate with violence in the hallway between periods.
A disgruntled employee threatened a manager with sabotage after being passed over for promotion.
The loan shark threatened a borrower with physical consequences for the missed payment.
A neighbor threatened a homeowner with a lawsuit over the fence encroaching on his property.
The stalker threatened a former partner with constant surveillance and unwanted contact.
A road rage driver threatened a motorist with a tire iron after the fender bender.
The abusive partner threatened a spouse with isolation from friends and family.
A debt collector threatened a consumer with wage garnishment and credit destruction.
The gang member threatened a witness with retaliation for cooperating with police.
A coach threatened a player with benching for the rest of the season.
The corrupt officer threatened a detainee with trumped-up charges unless he confessed.
A scammer threatened an elderly victim with fake arrest warrants over the phone.
The contractor threatened a subcontractor with withholding payment unless corners were cut.
A parent threatened a school principal with pulling funding if the policy was not reversed.
The prisoner threatened a guard with a sharpened implement during the cell inspection.
A hacker threatened a small business owner with publishing stolen financial records.
The foreman threatened a worker with termination for reporting safety violations.
A customer threatened a store clerk with a complaint to corporate over the return policy.
The mugger threatened a jogger with a knife on the dimly lit park trail.
A drunk patron threatened a bartender with smashing bottles unless he was served another drink.
The ex-husband threatened a divorce attorney with harassment for the custody outcome.
A telemarketer threatened an elderly resident with service disconnection if the fee was not paid.
The supervisor threatened an intern with a negative reference for refusing overtime.
North Korea threatened South Korea with artillery strikes along the demilitarized zone.
ISIS threatened the Yazidi community with genocide in the Sinjar region of Iraq.
The Taliban threatened NATO forces in Helmand Province with a spring offensive.
China threatened Taiwan with military exercises encircling the island.
The Sinaloa cartel threatened the citizens of Culiacan with violence during the failed arrest.
Russia threatened the European Union with gas supply cuts during the winter crisis.
Boko Haram threatened the population of Maiduguri with mass abduction.
The Khmer Rouge threatened the educated class of Phnom Penh with execution.
Iran threatened Israel with missile strikes from its proxy networks in Lebanon.
The IRA threatened the British government with a renewed bombing campaign in London.
Serbia threatened the Kosovar Albanian population with ethnic cleansing in 1998.
The Myanmar junta threatened the Rohingya minority with displacement from Rakhine state.
Al-Shabaab threatened Kenyan authorities with attacks on Nairobi shopping centers.
The Soviet Union threatened West Berlin with a full blockade of supply routes in 1948.
Hamas threatened the Israeli Defense Forces with tunnel infiltrations across the Gaza border.
Nazi Germany threatened Czechoslovakia with invasion unless the Sudetenland was ceded.
The Rwandan Interahamwe threatened the Tutsi population with systematic extermination.
Pakistan threatened India with nuclear retaliation during the Kargil conflict.
The Japanese Imperial Army threatened the garrison at Corregidor with overwhelming force.
Hezbollah threatened the residents of northern Israel with rocket barrages.
The apartheid regime threatened the ANC leadership in Soweto with mass detention.
Ethiopia threatened Eritrean border towns with aerial bombardment during the 1998 war.
The Bosnian Serb forces threatened the UN safe zone of Srebrenica with assault.
Argentina threatened the British garrison on the Falkland Islands with a naval invasion.
The Cuban missile crisis saw the Soviet Union that threatened the United States with nuclear warheads positioned ninety miles from Florida.
The militia group threatened a neighboring village with reprisal attacks for harboring refugees.
Striking workers threatened a factory with a blockade of all delivery trucks.
The gang threatened a housing project with drive-by shootings to intimidate witnesses.
Rioters threatened a police precinct with firebombs during the second night of unrest.
The rebel faction threatened a government convoy with an ambush along the mountain road.
Poachers threatened a wildlife sanctuary with snares set across every game trail.
The cartel threatened a border town with car bombings if authorities did not cooperate.
Armed separatists threatened a regional capital with a siege unless demands were met.
Extremists threatened a religious minority with forced conversion or expulsion.
The occupying army threatened a civilian district with collective punishment for resistance.
Smugglers threatened a coastal community with violence over control of landing sites.
The paramilitary group threatened a union hall with firebombing for organizing workers.
Insurgents threatened an oil pipeline with explosive devices planted along the route.
The cyber collective threatened a hospital network with ransomware unless payment was made.
Mercenaries threatened a mining camp with hostage-taking unless access fees were paid.
The nationalist mob threatened an embassy with storming the gates during the demonstration.
Armed squatters threatened a farmstead with burning the crops if they were forced to leave.
The prison gang threatened a cellblock with a riot unless conditions improved.
Protesters threatened a construction site with chaining themselves to equipment.
The vigilante group threatened a neighborhood with patrols that bordered on intimidation.
Hacktivists threatened a government website with a distributed denial-of-service attack.
The smuggling ring threatened a port authority with bribery or sabotage.
Striking miners threatened a rail line with a blockade using overturned equipment.
The mob threatened a courthouse with storming the building during the controversial trial.
Anti-government militias threatened a federal building with a standoff over land rights.

metadata.factorial_design: 2x2x2 (voice x scale x specificity) = 8 cells, 25 sentences per cell per group + 4 binary feature axes (violence, threat_scope, agent_type, consequence)
metadata.confound_notes: No structural confounds between roleplay and factual — same SVO syntax, no quotation marks, no punctuation differences. Context vocabulary (fantasy vs real-world) is the primary signal.
